name: FreeModel

pricing.input: 模型相关（平台加价待确认）

freeTier: 注册送额度（具体金额待确认）
highlights: DeepSeek 官方合作商
国内直连，访问稳定
支持主流开源模型
注册送免费额度
highlightsEN: Official DeepSeek partner
Direct access from China, stable connection
Supports major open-source models
Free credits on registration
cons: 模型种类少于 OpenRouter
平台定价需进一步核实
consEN: Fewer model varieties than OpenRouter
Platform pricing needs verification
bestFor: 需要 DeepSeek 系列模型；国内开发者；性价比优先
bestForEN: DeepSeek series models; China-based developers; cost-efficient

name: OpenAI
freeTier: $5 免费额度（新用户）
highlights: 模型最多、更新最快
生态最完善，工具最丰富
开发者体验最佳
highlightsEN: Most models, fastest updates
Most complete ecosystem, richest tools
Best developer experience
cons: 国内无法直接访问
价格相对较高
consEN: Cannot access directly from China
Relatively high pricing
bestFor: 需要最强模型能力的开发者；出海应用
bestForEN: Developers needing the most powerful models; international products

name: Anthropic
freeTier: 免费试用（需信用卡）
highlights: Claude 写作能力最强
长上下文最优（200K）
安全对齐业界领先
highlightsEN: Strongest writing capability
Best long context (200K)
Industry-leading safety alignment
cons: 国内无法直接访问
价格偏高
consEN: Cannot access directly from China
Relatively high pricing
bestFor: 需要高质量写作、复杂推理的应用
bestForEN: High-quality writing and complex reasoning applications

name: OpenRouter
freeTier: 50 req/day + 25个免费模型
highlights: 一个API Key调用400+模型
自动路由最优模型（Auto-Routing）
统一接口，灵活切换模型
BYOK（自备密钥）支持
highlightsEN: One API key → 400+ models from 60+ providers
Auto-routing to optimal model per query
Unified interface, easy model switching
BYOK (bring your own key) supported
cons: 国内访问偶尔不稳定
聚合层增加延迟和费用
无中文文档
consEN: Occasional instability in China
Extra latency and cost from aggregation layer
No Chinese documentation
bestFor: 需要对比测试多模型；需要Rare模型（如Grok、Qwen）；不想管理多个API Key
bestForEN: Multi-model evaluation; Rare model access; Developers who don't want multiple API keys

name: DeepSeek
freeTier: 注册送 $2 免费额度
highlights: 价格最低的顶级模型
DeepSeek-R1 推理能力强
国内直连速度快
highlightsEN: Cheapest top-tier models
DeepSeek-R1 with strong reasoning
Fast direct access in China
cons: 生态不如 OpenAI 丰富
国际支付不便
consEN: Ecosystem less mature than OpenAI
International payment inconvenient
bestFor: 国内开发者；预算敏感型项目
bestForEN: China-based developers; budget-sensitive projects

name: Google AI
freeTier: 免费额度（ Gemini 2.0 Flash 无限用）
highlights: Gemini 2.5 Flash 性价比极高
200K 上下文最强
Google 生态整合
highlightsEN: Gemini 2.5 Flash — best price-performance
Best-in-class 200K context window
Deep Google ecosystem integration
cons: 国内访问不稳定
文档质量参差不齐
consEN: Unstable access from China
Inconsistent documentation quality
bestFor: 多模态需求（图文音视频）；需要 Google 生态整合
bestForEN: Multimodal needs (image/text/audio/video); Google ecosystem integration

name: Perplexity AI
freeTier: Free credits with account; API requires signup
highlights: 实时网络搜索问答，不是普通 LLM
Sonar 模型原生集成搜索能力
支持 Deep Research 场景
学术和专业搜索场景表现优异
highlightsEN: Real-time web search Q&A, not a standard LLM
Sonar models natively integrate web search
Supports Deep Research use cases
Excellent for academic and professional search
cons: 仅支持搜索问答，非通用 LLM
国内访问需代理
上下文窗口相对较小
consEN: Search Q&A only, not a general-purpose LLM
Requires proxy from China
Relatively smaller context window
bestFor: 需要实时网络搜索的研究人员和开发者
bestForEN: Researchers and developers needing real-time web search
freeTierEN: Free credits with account; API requires signup

name: Alibaba Cloud
freeTier: API 提供免费调用量
highlights: 阿里云一键调用
与阿里云服务整合
国内速度最快

Deep Alibaba Cloud service integration
Fastest speed in China
cons: 模型能力弱于 GPT-4/Claude
生态系统有限
consEN: Weaker than GPT-4/Claude
Limited ecosystem
bestFor: 阿里云用户；国内企业快速接入 AI
bestForEN: Alibaba Cloud users; domestic enterprises rapid AI integration

name: Together AI
freeTier: Limited free credits for new accounts
highlights: 汇聚 Llama、Qwen、Mistral 等顶级开源模型
FLUX.1 图片生成 API 独家提供
DeepSeek-V3 首批上线平台
分钟级计费，灵活度高

Exclusive FLUX.1 image generation API
DeepSeek-V3 available at launch
Per-minute billing, high flexibility
cons: 部分模型需代理访问
海外服务商，客服响应慢
consEN: Some models require proxy for CN access
Overseas provider, slower support
bestFor: 需要调用多种开源模型的开发者，一站式访问 Llama/Qwen/FLUX
bestForEN: Developers needing access to multiple open-source models in one place: Llama, Qwen, FLUX
freeTierEN: Limited free credits for new accounts

name: Baidu AI Cloud
freeTier: ERNIE-Lite 免费
highlights: 中文理解最强
百度生态整合（搜索、文库等）
国内覆盖最广

Baidu ecosystem integration (Search, Wenku, etc.)
Widest coverage in China
cons: 国际模型能力差距明显
API 文档较难懂
consEN: Significant gap vs international models
API documentation is hard to follow
bestFor: 中文 NLP 任务；需要百度生态整合

适合长文档处理

Great for long document processing
cons: 比 DeepSeek 贵
模型能力中等

bestFor: 长文档处理；需要 Kimi 品牌的应用

免费额度充足

bestFor: 预算有限；学术/研究场景

与微信/QQ 整合

name: ByteDance Doubao
freeTier: 大量免费额度，新用户赠送
highlights: 价格全网最低（¥0.15/1M tokens起）
豆包2.0旗舰模型能力大幅提升
火山引擎/抖音/飞书生态整合
120万亿日均tokens，验证成熟

Volcengine/Douyin/Feishu ecosystem integration
120T tokens/day — battle-tested at scale

海外品牌知名度低

name: Block.AI (BAI)

pricing.input: 与模型有关（结构性价格优势）

freeTier: $100 免费额度（限时 1:1 存款匹配）
paidModel: 先充后用 / x402 原生加密支付
highlights: x402 原生加密支付协议——Agent 经济基础设施
Agent 自托管资金，自主采购算力，A2A 结算
隐私优先集成，不追踪用户数据
智能路由 + 统一多模型访问
Openclaw 深度集成
highlightsEN: Native x402 crypto payment protocol — Agent economic infrastructure
Self-custodying funds, autonomous compute procurement, A2A settlement
Privacy-first integration, no user data tracking
Intelligent routing + unified multi-model access
Deep Openclaw integration
cons: 新平台，文档尚在完善
部分功能需加密货币知识
国内访问未经测试
consEN: New platform, documentation still maturing
Some features require crypto knowledge
China access not yet tested
bestFor: AI Agent 开发者；加密原生应用；需要 A2A 经济结算的多 Agent 系统
bestForEN: AI Agent developers; crypto-native applications; multi-agent systems needing A2A economic settlement

Elon Musk 背景，话题性强

consEN: Cannot access directly from China
API is relatively new, documentation less mature than OpenAI
bestFor: 需要实时信息检索的应用；Grok 粉丝；对比评测

name: Fireworks AI

企业级 SLA 保障

Enterprise-grade SLA guarantees

价格比 DeepSeek 贵
生态比 OpenAI 小
consEN: Unstable access from China
More expensive than DeepSeek
Smaller ecosystem than OpenAI

name: APIKEY.FUN

pricing.input: 官方价格 × 分组倍率 ÷ 7（约 ¥1 = $1)

freeTier: 新用户注册送体验额度
highlights: 计价规则透明：$1 = ¥7，公式清晰
Claude Code / Codex / Gemini 主力模型均有
国内直连，适合国内开发者
支持 OpenClaw / Claude Code / Codex 工具调用
中文界面，中文客服

Claude Code, Codex, Gemini主力 models available
Direct access in China — no proxy needed
OpenClaw / Claude Code / Codex tool calling supported
Chinese interface, Chinese support
cons: 分组倍率不透明，需实际充值才知道最终价格
平台知名度不如 OpenRouter
无公开 API 定价页面
consEN: Group multiplier not transparent — final price unknown until recharge
Less known than OpenRouter
No public API pricing page
bestFor: 国内开发者；需要 Claude Code/Codex 工具调用；不想用代理的国际模型访问

Mistral Large 对标 GPT-4，代码能力强
Mixtral 开源模型社区活跃
MoE架构性价比高

Mixtral open-source models with active community
MoE architecture — excellent price-performance

文档以英文为主
consEN: Cannot access directly from China
Documentation primarily in English
bestFor: 出海应用；需要 GDPR 合规的欧洲产品；开源模型爱好者

name: Replicate
freeTier: 免费额度：创建账户后获得免费积分
availabilityCN: ⚠️ 部分可用（需代理或使用国内镜像）
highlights: 支持数百种开源模型
按秒计费，灵活成本控制
Stable Diffusion、FLUX、Llama 3 等热门模型
开源模型社区活跃

Per-second billing for flexible cost control
Popular models: SDXL, FLUX, Llama 3, Mistral, Kling
Active open-source model community
cons: GPU时间计费，总成本可能高于预期
国内访问不稳定，需要代理
文档质量参差不齐
部分模型需要较长冷启动时间
consEN: GPU time billing can lead to unexpected total costs
Unreliable access from China, proxy required
Inconsistent documentation quality across models
Cold start times can be long for some models
bestFor: 运行开源模型、Stable Diffusion/FLUX 图像生成、Llama 3 应用开发

多语言支持（100+语言）

Multilingual support (100+ languages)

Command 系列模型能力弱于 GPT-4/Claude
无中文文档

Command models weaker than GPT-4/Claude
No Chinese documentation

highlights: 汇聚 Llama、Qwen、Mistral 等顶级开源模型
支持 Ray 分布式计算后端
Anyscale Endpoints 企业级 SLA
highlightsEN: Aggregates top open-source models: Llama, Qwen, Mistral
Powered by Ray distributed computing backend
Anyscale Endpoints with enterprise SLA

免费额度较少

Limited free credits
bestFor: 需要企业级 SLA 和分布式计算能力的开发者

name: Azure OpenAI

pricing.standard: 与 OpenAI API 定价一致（Enterprise 客户可谈判）

freeTier: Azure 免费额度（12个月）
paidModel: 按量付费 / Enterprise 合同
availabilityCN: ⚠️ 部分可用（Azure 中国区有限制，建议国际区）
highlights: 企业级安全与合规（SOC 2, HIPAA, ISO 27001）
OpenAI 模型 + Azure 基础设施，稳定可靠
多地区部署，中国可访问（需国际区账号）
与 Microsoft 365、Teams、Power Platform 深度集成
highlightsEN: Enterprise security & compliance (SOC 2, HIPAA, ISO 27001)
OpenAI models + Azure infrastructure, reliable and stable
Multi-region deployment, accessible from China (international region required)
Deep integration with Microsoft 365, Teams, Power Platform
cons: 需要 Azure 账号和信用卡
国内注册需要企业认证或个人验证
Enterprise 定价需谈判
consEN: Requires Azure account and credit card
Registration in China requires enterprise认证 or personal verification
Enterprise pricing requires negotiation
bestFor: 企业客户；已有 Microsoft 365 生态的团队；需要高合规性的应用
bestForEN: Enterprise customers; teams already in Microsoft 365 ecosystem; high-compliance applications
availabilityEN: ⚠️ Partially available (Azure China limited, recommend international region)

name: Stability AI

pricingEN.input: Per-image credits (SD 3.5 Large: 6.5 credits per 1024×1024 image)
pricingEN.output: Per-image credits (Stable Image Ultra: 8 credits per image)

freeTier: Free trial: 25 credits on signup (≈ 3-4 SD 3.5 Large images)
freeTierEN: Free trial: 25 credits on signup (≈ 3-4 SD 3.5 Large images)
availabilityCN: ❌ 需代理（API 域名 platform.stability.ai 在国内不可直接访问）
availabilityEN: ❌ Proxy required (platform.stability.ai is blocked in mainland China)
highlights: Stable Diffusion 3.5 系列：开源图像生成 SOTA 水平
Stable Image Ultra：商业级图像质量，FLUX 级别竞争力
Stable Video 4D：4D 视频生成，先发优势明显
按 credit 计费，比订阅更灵活
API 输出符合 C2PA 内容凭证标准
highlightsEN: Stable Diffusion 3.5 series: open-source SOTA image generation
Stable Image Ultra: commercial-grade image quality, FLUX-tier competitiveness
Stable Video 4D: 4D video generation, first-mover advantage
Credit-based pricing — more flexible than subscriptions
C2PA content credentials on all generated images
cons: 国内访问 platform.stability.ai 需要稳定代理
无中文界面，中文社区支持薄弱
API rate limit 较严格（Developer 套餐 150 req/min）
与 Midjourney / FLUX 等相比缺少 Discord 等社区渠道
consEN: platform.stability.ai requires stable proxy access from China
No Chinese interface, weak Chinese-language community support
Strict API rate limits (Developer plan: 150 req/min)
Lacks Discord/community channels that Midjourney/FLUX have
bestFor: 商业图像生成、Stable Diffusion 生态开发、4D 视频生成研究
bestForEN: Commercial image generation, Stable Diffusion ecosystem development, 4D video research

name: Groq
freeTier: Free tier: rate-limited (30 req/min, 14.4K tokens/min, 1K req/day) — no credit card required
freeTierEN: Free tier: rate-limited (30 req/min, 14.4K tokens/min, 1K req/day) — no credit card required
availabilityCN: ❌ 需代理（console.groq.com 与 api.groq.com 在国内不可直接访问）
availabilityEN: ❌ Proxy required (console.groq.com and api.groq.com are blocked in mainland China)
highlights: LPU 推理引擎：业界最快的 LLM 推理速度（Llama 3.1 8B 可达 1250 tokens/sec）
OpenAI 兼容 API：现有 OpenAI 客户端代码几乎无改动即可切换
免费套餐慷慨：开发期可零成本跑原型
Llama 3.3 70B 价格远低于 GPT-4o，推理速度是后者的 5-10 倍
Whisper Large V3 ASR 价格极低（$0.006/分钟）
highlightsEN: LPU inference engine: fastest LLM inference in the industry (Llama 3.1 8B up to 1,250 tokens/sec)
OpenAI-compatible API: drop-in replacement for OpenAI client code
Generous free tier: zero-cost prototyping for development
Llama 3.3 70B priced far below GPT-4o with 5-10x faster inference
Whisper Large V3 ASR priced at $0.006/minute — extremely low
cons: 国内访问需稳定代理（Groq 域名在 GFW 名单）
模型选择比 OpenAI/Anthropic 少，主要是开源模型（Llama、Mixtral、Gemma）
无 fine-tuning 服务，纯推理
免费套餐 rate limit 严格（30 req/min），不适合生产环境
上下文窗口最大仅 128K，落后于 GPT-4o 的 1M 和 Claude 的 200K
consEN: China access requires stable proxy (Groq domains on GFW blocklist)
Smaller model selection vs OpenAI/Anthropic — primarily open-source (Llama, Mixtral, Gemma)
No fine-tuning service, inference only
Strict free-tier rate limits (30 req/min) — not production-ready
Max context window 128K, behind GPT-4o (1M) and Claude (200K)
bestFor: 低延迟实时聊天、语音 Agent、代码补全、批量推理、Hugging Face 模型的快速商用化
bestForEN: Low-latency real-time chat, voice agents, code completion, batch inference, fast commercialization of Hugging Face models

name: Hugging Face

pricing.input: Pay-per-use Inference API: $0.05–$4/M tokens depending on model size
pricing.output: Pay-per-use Inference API: $0.10–$8/M tokens depending on model size
pricing.cacheRead: Free tier: $0.10/hr of CPU compute (limited free credits)
pricing.unit: USD per million tokens (LLM) or per second (GPU) or per image

pricingEN.input: Pay-per-use Inference API: $0.05–$4/M tokens depending on model size
pricingEN.output: Pay-per-use Inference API: $0.10–$8/M tokens depending on model size
pricingEN.unit: USD per million tokens (LLM) or per second (GPU) or per image

freeTier: Free $0.10/hr of CPU compute (Spaces) + limited Inference API credits on signup
freeTierEN: Free $0.10/hr of CPU compute (Spaces) + limited Inference API credits on signup
paidModel: Pay-per-use (Inference API, Dedicated Endpoints) or PRO subscription ($9/month)
availabilityCN: ❌ 需代理（huggingface.co 域名在国内访问受限）
availabilityEN: ❌ Proxy required (huggingface.co domain is restricted in mainland China)
highlights: 全球最大开源模型社区，超过 100 万个模型可访问
Inference API 统一接口，无需自行部署 GPU
免费 Spaces GPU 额度，适合 demo 和原型开发
支持 Llama 3.3、Qwen 2.5、Mistral 等 SOTA 开源模型
Embeddings、ASR、Diffusion、LLM 一站式接入
highlightsEN: World's largest open-source model hub, 1M+ models accessible
Unified Inference API — no need to deploy your own GPU
Free Spaces GPU credits for demos and prototypes
Supports SOTA open models: Llama 3.3, Qwen 2.5, Mistral
One-stop shop: embeddings, ASR, diffusion, LLMs
cons: 国内访问 huggingface.co 需要稳定代理
Inference API 偶有冷启动延迟（>30s 冷启）
Dedicated Endpoints 价格对中小企业偏高
免费额度（$0.10/小时 CPU）不足以跑生产负载
中文模型生态相对弱于 ModelScope / Wisemodel
consEN: huggingface.co requires stable proxy access from China
Inference API has occasional cold-start latency (over 30s)
Dedicated Endpoints pricing is steep for SMBs
Free tier ($0.10/hr CPU) cannot run production workloads
Chinese model ecosystem lags behind ModelScope / Wisemodel
bestFor: 开源模型实验、Embedding/RAG 管线、原型验证、多模型 A/B 对比
bestForEN: Open-source model experimentation, embedding/RAG pipelines, prototype validation, multi-model A/B comparison

name: Cerebras
freeTier: 注册送 $5 免费额度
availabilityCN: ❌ 需代理（平台托管于美国数据中心）
highlights: Wafer-Scale Engine (WSE-3) 芯片，推理速度 2,000+ tok/s
Llama 3.3 70B 统一进输出定价 $0.60/M tokens
Chat 兼容且原生支持工具调用（function calling）
零冷启动（always-hot inference pool）
OpenAI API 兼容 SDK，迁移成本低
highlightsEN: Wafer-Scale Engine (WSE-3) chip delivers 2,000+ tok/s inference
Llama 3.3 70B combined input-output at $0.60/M tokens
Chat Completions API with native function calling
Zero cold start (always-hot inference pool)
OpenAI API compatible SDK, zero migration cost
cons: 国内访问需要稳定代理
模型选择相对有限（~6 个主要模型）
不支持缓存命中降价
无 Embeddings / 文生图等多模态能力
定价为合计输入+输出，预算拆分不够灵活
consEN: Requires stable proxy for China access
Limited model selection (~6 major models)
No cache discount pricing
No embeddings or image generation support
Combined input+output billing, less granular budgeting
bestFor: 对推理速度有高要求的 LLM 应用；实时 Chatbot；需要 OpenAI 兼容 API 的低延迟替代
bestForEN: Latency-sensitive LLM applications; real-time chatbots; low-latency OpenAI API-compatible alternative

name: DeepInfra

pricing.unit: per 1M tokens (pay-as-you-go, $1 free credits on signup)

pricingEN.unit: per 1M tokens (pay-as-you-go, $1 free credits on signup)

freeTier: 注册赠送 $1 免费额度，无需信用卡；批量任务折扣最高 50% off
freeTierEN: $1 free credit on signup, no credit card required; up to 50% off for batch/async inference
paidModel: 按量付费（支持按 token 计费 + 批量推理折扣）
availabilityCN: ❌ 需代理（deepinfra.com 与 api.deepinfra.com 在国内不稳定）
availabilityEN: ❌ Proxy required (deepinfra.com and api.deepinfra.com are unreliable from mainland China)
highlights: 业界最低价 LLM 推理之一：Llama 3.3 70B 仅 $0.35/M 输入 + $0.40/M 输出，比 Together AI 还便宜 30%
支持 50+ 开源模型（Llama 3.3、DeepSeek V3/R1、Qwen2.5、Mistral、Phi-4），覆盖度高于 Groq / Cerebras
OpenAI 兼容 API：现有 OpenAI 客户端代码可直接切换（base_url 替换）
支持 405B 超大模型：Meta-Llama-3.1-405B-Instruct 推理价格仅 $0.90/M
冷启动时间 < 1s，按 token 计费无最低消费
支持 serverless 批量推理：off-peak 时段 50% 折扣
highlightsEN: Among the lowest-priced LLM inference APIs: Llama 3.3 70B at $0.35/M input + $0.40/M output — 30% cheaper than Together AI
50+ open-source models supported (Llama 3.3, DeepSeek V3/R1, Qwen2.5, Mistral, Phi-4) — broader than Groq/Cerebras
OpenAI-compatible API: drop-in replacement for OpenAI client code (just change base_url)
405B-class model support: Meta-Llama-3.1-405B-Instruct at $0.90/M
Sub-1s cold start, per-token billing, no minimum commitment
Serverless batch inference with 50% off-peak discount
cons: 国内访问需稳定代理（api.deepinfra.com 经常被 GFW 屏蔽）
无 fine-tuning 服务，纯推理（区别于 Together AI）
高峰期吞吐速度不及 Groq / Cerebras（约 80-200 tok/s）
免费额度仅 $1，量级小于 Groq / FreeModel
无 SLA 保障，企业级部署需要联系销售签合同
支持语音/图像多模态有限，主要专注文本 LLM
consEN: China access requires stable proxy (api.deepinfra.com frequently blocked by GFW)
No fine-tuning service — pure inference only (unlike Together AI)
Peak throughput slower than Groq/Cerebras (around 80-200 tok/s)
Free credits only $1 — much less than Groq/FreeModel
No SLA guarantee; enterprise deployments require sales contract
Limited multimodal support — primarily text LLM focused
bestFor: 低预算生产环境推理、Hugging Face 模型快速商用、DeepSeek-R1 / Qwen2.5 推理、研究项目 batch 任务
bestForEN: Budget production inference, fast commercialization of Hugging Face models, DeepSeek-R1/Qwen2.5 serving, research batch jobs

name: Cloudflare AI Gateway

pricing.input: 上游厂商定价（无网关加价）

freeTier: 无固定免费额度，按上游厂商策略
paidModel: 按上游厂商 token 计费 + Cloudflare Workers 计费
availabilityCN: ❌ 需代理（Cloudflare 部分边缘节点国内访问受限）
highlights: 聚合 100+ 模型，OpenAI / Anthropic / Google / Mistral 统一接口
Cloudflare 边缘缓存，重复 prompt 命中可大幅降本
6/5 新增实时消费限制（per-account/per-team/per-key）
配合 Cloudflare Access 可做身份级速率限制
Workers AI 模型免计费（在 Cloudflare 网络内推理）
内置日志和分析，跨厂商请求统一审计
highlightsEN: Aggregates 100+ models (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Mistral) with one endpoint
Cloudflare edge caching — repeated prompts drop cost dramatically
6/5 launched real-time spend limits (per-account, per-team, per-key)
Pair with Cloudflare Access for identity-based rate limits
Workers AI models free within Cloudflare network
Built-in logs and analytics for cross-vendor audit
cons: 不是模型本身，需要保留上游 API key
国内访问 Cloudflare 受限
缓存逻辑需自行调优（默认 TTL 较短）
Workers 计费单独计算（请求数 + CPU 时间）
consEN: Not a model itself — still needs upstream provider API keys
Cloudflare access is restricted in mainland China
Cache logic needs tuning (default TTL is short)
Workers usage billed separately (requests + CPU time)
bestFor: 多厂商 AI API 统一管理；成本控制；团队级 token 预算；跨厂商请求审计
bestForEN: Multi-vendor AI API management; cost control; team-level token budgets; cross-vendor request auditing
freeTierEN: No fixed free tier; follows upstream vendor policy

name: Portkey
models: Groq, Together AI, Fireworks AI, Anyscale

pricing.input: 上游厂商定价（无网关加价）
pricing.cacheRead: 支持缓存命中免费或 50% 折扣

freeTier: 免费层：1K requests/月 + 团队 5 个成员
availabilityCN: ❌ 需代理（控制台和 API endpoint 部分受限）
highlights: Gateway + Observability 一体：日志、追踪、成本分析内置
支持 Config 路由：按成本/延迟/上下文长度自动选模型
细粒度 spend limits：hard/soft caps per key/team/project
Prompt versioning + A/B testing 闭环
OpenAI SDK 零代码改动（base_url 切换）
Fallback 链 + 自动重试 + 多 vendor 负载均衡
highlightsEN: Gateway + Observability in one: logs, traces, cost analytics built-in
Config-based routing: auto-select model by cost, latency, or context length
Fine-grained spend limits: hard/soft caps per key/team/project
Prompt versioning with A/B testing built in
Zero-code-change OpenAI SDK integration (just swap base_url)
Fallback chains, automatic retries, and multi-vendor load balancing
cons: 免费层只 1K requests/月，超出后必须升级
控制台 UI 较新，部分高级分析在 Pro 层
需要保留上游 API key
国内访问 Portkey 控制台可能受限
consEN: Free tier limited to 1K requests/month, upgrades required beyond that
Console UI relatively new, some advanced analytics gated to Pro
Still need upstream API keys
Portkey console may be geo-restricted from China
bestFor: 中大型团队：需要可观测性 + 成本控制 + fallback 的多 vendor 生产
bestForEN: Mid-to-large teams needing observability + cost control + fallback for multi-vendor production
availabilityEN: ❌ Proxy required (Portkey console and some API endpoints geo-restricted)

name: LiteLLM
models: Hugging Face, Together AI, Fireworks AI, Replicate
freeTier: 完全免费（开源 Apache 2.0），自托管无限制
paidModel: Enterprise：自托管 + 商业支持套餐
availabilityCN: ✅ 完全可控（自托管，无地域限制）
highlights: Apache 2.0 开源：自托管，零 vendor lock-in
统一 100+ provider 接口（OpenAI SDK 完全兼容）
内置 spend tracking、rate limiting、budgets per key/team
支持路由策略：cost-based, latency-based, usage-based
支持 callback hooks：Langfuse、Helicone、Prometheus 等观测
Docker / Kubernetes 部署，团队内部完全控制
highlightsEN: Apache 2.0 open source: self-hosted, zero vendor lock-in
Unified interface for 100+ providers (OpenAI SDK fully compatible)
Built-in spend tracking, rate limiting, and per-key/team budgets
Routing strategies: cost-based, latency-based, usage-based
Callback hooks for Langfuse, Helicone, Prometheus observability
Docker / Kubernetes deployment, full team control
cons: 需要自己运维（容器化、监控、扩缩容）
功能丰富但 UI 较简单，主要看 logs
配置复杂度高于托管型 gateway
需要团队有 DevOps 资源
consEN: Requires self-hosting (containers, monitoring, scaling)
Feature-rich but UI is simple, mostly log-based
Configuration complexity higher than managed gateways
Team needs DevOps resources
bestFor: 数据敏感 / 自托管需求 / 大流量 + DevOps 团队
bestForEN: Data-sensitive workloads, self-hosting requirements, high-traffic + DevOps teams

name: SambaNova
freeTier: 注册送 $5 免费额度，足够跑 10M tokens 的 8B 模型
freeTierEN: $5 free credits on signup, enough for ~10M tokens on Llama 3.1 8B
availabilityCN: ❌ 需代理（平台托管于美国数据中心）
highlights: SN40L Reconfigurable Dataflow Unit (RDU) 芯片，推理速度 1,000+ tok/s
Llama 3.3 70B 综合进输出定价 $1.00/M tokens，介于 Groq 与 Cerebras 之间
独家提供 Llama 3.1 405B 高参数模型，OpenAI API 兼容
原生支持 DeepSeek-R1 推理模型（满血 671B）
Dataflow 架构能效比 GPU 高 5-10 倍
highlightsEN: SN40L Reconfigurable Dataflow Unit (RDU) chip delivers 1,000+ tok/s
Llama 3.3 70B combined input+output at $1.00/M tokens, between Groq and Cerebras pricing
Exclusive access to Llama 3.1 405B high-parameter model, OpenAI API compatible
Native support for DeepSeek-R1 reasoning model (full 671B)
Dataflow architecture delivers 5-10x better energy efficiency than GPU
cons: 国内访问需要稳定代理
模型种类不及 Together AI 或 Hugging Face 多
不支持缓存命中降价
无 Embeddings / 图像生成（专注 LLM 推理）
企业版价格不公开，需走 sales 通道
consEN: Requires stable proxy for China access
Fewer models than Together AI or Hugging Face
No cache discount pricing
No embeddings or image generation (LLM inference focus)
Enterprise pricing not public, sales-channel only
bestFor: 需要 405B / DeepSeek-R1 满血参数模型的企业；高吞吐 LLM 推理；私有化部署（DataScale 系统）
bestForEN: Enterprises needing 405B / DeepSeek-R1 full-parameter models; high-throughput LLM inference; private deployments (DataScale system)

name: SiliconFlow
freeTier: 注册送 ¥1-200 免费额度（按活动调整），足够跑 1-20M tokens
freeTierEN: ¥1-200 free credits on signup (varies by promo), enough for 1-20M tokens
highlights: 国内一站式模型托管，100+ 开源模型在线
Qwen3.5 / DeepSeek / GLM-4 / Llama 3 全覆盖
国内直连，无需代理
首发 Nex-N2-Pro（397B MoE 推理模型）
¥0.4/1M tokens 起，价格低于 OpenAI 官方价 80%
支持 OpenAI 兼容 API
highlightsEN: All-in-one model hosting in China, 100+ open-source models online
Full Qwen3.5 / DeepSeek / GLM-4 / Llama 3 coverage
Direct access from China, no proxy needed
First-launch of Nex-N2-Pro (397B MoE reasoning model)
Pricing from ¥0.4/1M tokens, 80% lower than OpenAI official
OpenAI-compatible API
cons: 海外访问需走代理
不支持 GPT/Claude 系列
模型更新滞后官方 1-2 周
无 Function Calling 一等公民支持
价格对汇率波动敏感
consEN: Overseas access requires proxy
Does not host GPT/Claude series
Model updates lag official by 1-2 weeks
No first-class Function Calling support
Pricing sensitive to FX fluctuations
bestFor: 国内开发者；想一站式调用国产开源模型（Qwen3.5/DeepSeek/GLM）的团队；追求极致性价比的 RAG/推理场景
bestForEN: China-based developers; teams wanting one-stop access to Chinese open-source models (Qwen3.5/DeepSeek/GLM); cost-efficient RAG/reasoning scenarios

name: DigitalOcean Gradient

pricing.input: GPU 算力计费：H100 $2.16/小时起，H200 $3.20/小时起（按 token 等价折算后 Llama 3.1 8B 约 $0.20/M tokens）
pricing.output: 按量计费，Serverless Inference 模式起价 $0.0005/1000 tokens
pricing.cacheRead: 支持 endpoint 缓存命中降价

pricingEN.input: GPU compute billing: H100 from $2.16/hr, H200 from $3.20/hr; on-demand LLM endpoints ~$0.20/M tokens for Llama 3.1 8B
pricingEN.output: Usage-based; Serverless Inference starts at $0.0005/1K tokens
pricingEN.cacheRead: Cache hits discounted on serverless endpoints

freeTier: 注册送 $200 免费额度（60 天有效）
freeTierEN: $200 in credits valid for 60 days on signup
paidModel: 预充值按量计费 / 月度订阅
availabilityCN: ❌ 需代理（平台托管于美国、欧洲、新加坡数据中心）
availabilityEN: ❌ Proxy required (US, EU, Singapore data centers)
highlights: DigitalOcean 一键部署 GPU 推理：H100 / H200 / L40S 任选
Serverless Inference 模式按 token 付费，不用自管 GPU
6/3 起作为模型供应商接入 OpenRouter 生态
Knowledge Base / Agent 平台一体化（向量 + 推理 + 工具调用）
原始 Hugging Face 模型 1-click 部署，自带私有化选项
highlightsEN: One-click GPU inference on H100 / H200 / L40S
Serverless Inference billed per token — no GPU management
Joined OpenRouter as a model provider on June 3, 2026
All-in-one Knowledge Base, agent, and vector store alongside inference
1-click deploy of any Hugging Face model with private deployment option
cons: 模型数量远不及 OpenRouter / Hugging Face
国内访问 DigitalOcean 控制台与 API 端点均需稳定代理
Serverless 模式冷启动偶发 2-3s
免费额度只对新用户 60 天有效，老用户无持续免费层
企业级 SLA 与私有部署价格不透明
consEN: Far fewer models than OpenRouter or Hugging Face
Both the dashboard and API endpoints require a stable proxy from China
Serverless endpoints occasionally show 2-3s cold start
Free credits expire after 60 days for new accounts only; no permanent free tier
Enterprise SLA and on-prem pricing not publicly listed
bestFor: 需要 H100 满血 + 一体化平台（推理 + 向量库 + Agent）的团队；OpenRouter 多模型路由的新接入选项；私有化部署 Hugging Face 开源模型
bestForEN: Teams needing H100 throughput with an all-in-one platform (inference + vector store + agents); the new OpenRouter model provider; private deployments of Hugging Face open-source models

name: Novita AI
freeTier: $0.5 signup credit (one-time)
highlights: 200+ 开源模型在线 (Llama / Qwen / DeepSeek / Mistral)
OpenAI 兼容 API,无 SDK 改造
起价 $0.06/百万 token (Llama 3.1 8B)
国内直连 cn.novita.ai,延迟低
Serverless GPU 推理 + 独立 GPU 租赁双模式
支持自定义模型部署和 LoRA 微调
highlightsEN: 200+ open-source models (Llama / Qwen / DeepSeek / Mistral)
OpenAI-compatible API, no SDK rewrite needed
Pricing from $0.06/1M tokens (Llama 3.1 8B)
China-direct access via cn.novita.ai, low latency
Serverless GPU inference + dedicated GPU rental
Custom model deployment and LoRA fine-tuning supported
cons: 无 GPT-5 / Claude 4 / Gemini 2.5 等闭源模型
免费额度较小,仅 $0.5 一次性
工具调用 (function calling) 兼容性弱于一线厂商
Serverless 实例冷启动偶有 3-5s 延迟
无 SOC2 / ISO27001 公开认证
consEN: No closed-source models (GPT-5, Claude 4, Gemini 2.5)
Small free tier (one-time $0.5 credit)
Function calling compatibility weaker than tier-1 providers
Serverless cold start occasionally 3-5s
No public SOC2 / ISO27001 certification
bestFor: 需要调用 200+ 开源模型、追求低单价、国内直连的中小团队
bestForEN: Mid-size teams needing 200+ open-source models, low per-token cost, and China-direct access

name: AI21 Labs
freeTier: 注册送 $10 一次性免费额度，足够跑 5M tokens 的 Jamba 1.5 Mini
freeTierEN: $10 one-time signup credit, enough for ~5M tokens on Jamba 1.5 Mini
paidModel: 预充值后按量计费，无月度最低
availabilityCN: ❌ 需代理（无中国大陆合规入口）
highlights: Jamba 1.5 系列采用 SSM-Transformer 混合架构，398B 总参/94B 激活，长上下文 256K 原生支持
OpenAI 兼容 API（/v1/chat/completions），SDK 零改造切换
Jamba 1.5 Mini 价格仅 $0.20/M token，性价比优于 GPT-4o-mini 的多数场景
支持工具调用（function calling）与 JSON mode
通过 AWS Bedrock、Microsoft Azure AI Foundry、NVIDIA NIM 三家云市场分发
highlightsEN: Jamba 1.5 series uses SSM-Transformer hybrid architecture with 398B total/94B active params and native 256K context
OpenAI-compatible API (/v1/chat/completions), zero SDK rewrite needed
Jamba 1.5 Mini priced at $0.20/M tokens, competitive with GPT-4o-mini for most workloads
Supports function calling and JSON mode
Distributed through AWS Bedrock, Azure AI Foundry, and NVIDIA NIM marketplaces
cons: 模型种类较少（仅 Jamba 系列，无 Llama / Qwen / DeepSeek 转发）
国内访问需稳定代理，无 ICP / 合规入口
Jamba 1.5 Large 价格（$2/M）高于 Llama 3.3 70B（$0.39-$0.88/M）
工具调用可靠性弱于 OpenAI / Anthropic 一线厂商
第三方基准（如 MMLU、HumanEval）覆盖少于头部闭源模型
consEN: Limited model variety (Jamba series only, no Llama / Qwen / DeepSeek rehosting)
China access requires stable proxy, no ICP-filed infrastructure
Jamba 1.5 Large ($2/M) is more expensive than Llama 3.3 70B ($0.39-$0.88/M)
Function calling reliability is weaker than OpenAI / Anthropic tier-1 vendors
Third-party benchmark coverage (MMLU, HumanEval) is thinner than top closed-source models
bestFor: 需要长上下文（256K）+ 高吞吐的中大型企业；SSM 架构特有的显存效率优势；多云分发场景（Bedrock + Azure AI）
bestForEN: Mid-to-large enterprises needing long context (256K) + high throughput; teams leveraging SSM's memory efficiency; multi-cloud distribution (Bedrock + Azure AI)

name: NVIDIA NIM

pricing.note: NVIDIA partners with Bitdeer AI, Deep Infra, Together AI, DigitalOcean, GMI Cloud for endpoint hosting; 50+ third-party open-source models at partner-set prices

pricingEN.note: Hosted through partner endpoints (Bitdeer AI, Deep Infra, Together AI, DigitalOcean, GMI Cloud); 50+ third-party models at partner-set prices

freeTier: 免费开发端点（无需信用卡，生成 API Key 即可开始）
freeTierEN: Free serverless API endpoints for prototyping (no credit card required, generate API key to start)
paidModel: 通过合作伙伴端点按量计费（即用即付，无最低消费）
availabilityCN: ❌ 需代理（build.nvidia.com 平台为美国服务，受出口管制限制）
availabilityEN: ❌ Proxy required (US-based platform, export control restrictions apply)
highlights: NVIDIA 自研 Nemotron-3 系列：LatentMoE（Mamba-2 + MoE + Attention）混合架构
Llama-Nemotron 优化模型（NVIDIA 用自家 GPU 微调过的 Llama 系列）
OpenAI 兼容 API（/v1/chat/completions），SDK 零改造
免费 Prototyping 端点，无需信用卡
80+ 模型覆盖：Llama / Qwen / Mistral / DeepSeek / Kimi / GLM / Gemma / Phi
NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM 推理引擎，GPU 利用率最大化
highlightsEN: NVIDIA's own Nemotron-3 series: LatentMoE (Mamba-2 + MoE + Attention) hybrid architecture
Llama-Nemotron optimized models (Llama fine-tuned by NVIDIA on their own GPUs)
OpenAI-compatible API (/v1/chat/completions), zero SDK rewrite
Free prototyping endpoints, no credit card required
80+ models covering Llama / Qwen / Mistral / DeepSeek / Kimi / GLM / Gemma / Phi
Powered by NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM inference engine for optimal GPU utilization
cons: NVIDIA 不直接运营 API——合作伙伴端点定价和服务质量参差不齐
国内访问需稳定代理，受美国出口管制限制
无统一计费——每个合作伙伴端点独立计费和注册
速度基准数据未公开发布，第三方测试数据有限
非 NVIDIA 自研模型的推理性能未公开优化
consEN: NVIDIA does not directly operate the API — partner endpoint pricing and QoS vary
China access requires stable proxy, subject to US export controls
No unified billing — each partner charges separately with individual signup
Speed benchmarks not publicly published; limited third-party data
Non-NVIDIA models' inference performance not publicly optimized
bestFor: 需要最新 NVIDIA 自研 Nemotron 模型的团队；探索 LiveAgent（代理技能平台）的开发者；多端点部署测试的 AI 工程团队
bestForEN: Teams needing the latest NVIDIA Nemotron models; developers exploring the LiveAgent platform; AI engineering teams multi-endpoint deployment testing
